statement: Stage + island layout contract — Different surfaces affect the Stage differently, and this must be explicit so future components do not break the canvas. — Explicit layout contract: Editor/Viewer Island reduces/pushes the stage (no overlay); sticky popup shell floats above the stage (no resize); Focus Island filters/isolates visible data (no mutation); View Helper popup floats above the stage and bridges opposite-view logic. Future components must declare which contract they follow.
